description: AI-powered security alert processing and incident routing

stages.name: AlertIngestion
stages.description: Security alert arrives from SIEM, EDR, or other source

stages.name: AIAnalysis
stages.description: Claude AI classifies severity, extracts IOCs, recommends actions

stages.name: SeverityRouter
stages.description: Branch to appropriate response path based on AI classification

stages.name: CriticalResponse
stages.description: P1 response: page on-call, notify exec, isolate host, open war room

stages.name: HighResponse
stages.description: P2 response: create ticket, notify security team, block IOCs

stages.name: MediumResponse
stages.description: P3 response: log ticket, notify analyst for review

stages.name: HumanReview
stages.description: Human analyst reviews AI classification when confidence < 0.7

stages.name: Closed
stages.description: Incident resolved, report generated, post-mortem scheduled if P1/P2
